object_a.label: couch
object_a.description: dark brown leather reclining sofa along left wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Three-seat dark brown leather reclining sofa with visible seams and padded headrests. The sofa sits on the carpet against the left wall and extends into the foreground; leather has slight sheen and appears in good condition.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly below the left window and to the left of the central floor area; faces toward the camera/viewing direction.
